title: PackTimer
description:
Timer with many features and an simple interface
I will add more features to it soon™
body:
# PackTimer

![Timer in 1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8022889ce2941afb728f6efa85b60c8d77292b43.png)

## Update
If you update, run the function ```/function timer:update``` if there are any problems!

## Features
- Timer with Day Counter
- Milliseconds Counter :D
- Easy to use
- English and german language options
- 16 different colors supported
- Simple to install and update

## Tags
Disabling the interface:
```
/tag PLAYERNAME add timer.disable_interface
```
Disabling the timer:
```
/tag PLAYERNAME add timer.disable_timer
```

## How to use
- Make sure you have commands enabled or have OP on a server.
- Type: ```/trigger timer.interface```
- Change some settings or start the timer!
![Timer Interface 1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5035c4212f0fd18d371bb6363e8195ae53c96c26.png)


### Installation
1. Install the Datapack
   (note: In Minecraft the Datapack may appear to be "unsupported", but it still works if you downloaded the correct version.)
2. Make sure you have commands enabled
3. Run the command ```/trigger timer.interface```
